name: public-scanner
description: Monorepo for scanning public procurement opportunities relevant to software and IT services.

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @public-scanner/domain && npm run build --workspace @public-scanner/connectors && npm run build --workspace @public-scanner/db && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @public-scanner/domain && npm run build --workspace @public-scanner/connectors && npm run build --workspace @public-scanner/db && vitest run
